items.title: A single protein may be holding back CAR T cancer therapy
items.summary: A newly identified protein may be one of the biggest obstacles holding CAR T-cell therapy back. Researchers found that NFIL3 causes these engineered immune cells to become exhausted and lose their cancer-fighting power over time. items.title: More black men to benefit from prostate cancer screening trial
items.summary: Experts are trying to find the best way to screen for prostate cancer, since blood tests alone are not accurate enough for most men.

items.title: Scientists discover gut bacteria that may help protect against autism and ADHD

items.title: One fat helped pancreatic cancer grow while another cut disease in half
items.summary: A surprising new study suggests that when it comes to pancreatic cancer, the kind of fat you eat may matter more than how much.
